sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, created_at DateTime, value String);
SELECT connectionId(), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) AS year, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT connectionId(), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) AS month FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) AS subquery HAVING month = 2;
SELECT connectionId(), EXTRACT(DAY FROM MAX(created_at)) AS max_day FROM (SELECT created_at FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS filtered GROUP BY max_day HAVING max_day > 1;
SELECT connectionId(), COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) ORDER BY connectionId();
CREATE TABLE test_join_table (id UInt64, test_id UInt64, description String);

SELECT t1.connectionId(), t2.description, EXTRACT(DAY FROM t1.created_at) AS day FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_join_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.test_id WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t1.created_at) IN (SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) FROM test_table GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
SELECT connectionId(), EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM created_at) AS minute, value FROM test_table GROUP BY minute HAVING value IS NOT NULL AND minute BETWEEN 0 AND 60 ORDER BY minute DESC;
